◎译　　名　体坛秘史：拉玛尔·奥多姆的生死边缘 / Untold: The Death & Life of Lamar Odom
◎上映日期　2026-03-31
◎产　　地　United States of America
◎类　　别　纪录
◎语　　言　en

◎TMDb评分  8/10 from 2 users
◎导　　演　Ryan Duffy
◎主　　演　拉玛尔·奥多姆
　　　　  　科勒·卡戴珊

◎简　　介

　　这部纪录片讲述了拉玛尔·奥多姆的人生故事，从一跃成为 NBA 的明星到与科勒·卡戴珊结婚，再到在一家内华达州的妓院因吸毒过量险些丧命。

item.description:

📅 发布时间: Fri, 03 Apr 2026 16:36:19 +0800

⬇️ 详情: https://hdhome.org/details.php?id=286435

📄 原文内容:

引用 CMCT官组作品，感谢原制作者发布。


引用
本作素材：
1.片源：取自  An.Ancient.Love.Song.S01.2023.JPN.Blu-ray.1080i.AVC.DTS-HD.MA.2.0-AREY 。
2.字幕：取自 MiniTV@subhd ，由 南瓜@CMCT 调整匹配蓝光，逐句二次精校时间轴，修正部分字幕错误。特别集字幕由本人OCR自流媒体，补全全集片中插曲歌词
3.说明：特别集取自原盘花絮，画面带有黑底白字日文硬字幕，特此说明

以上素材一并表示感谢 字幕素材未经字幕原作者允许严禁提取封装压制发布——南瓜@CMCT



                       
◎译　　名　An Ancient Love Song
◎片　　名　古相思曲
◎年　　代　2023
◎产　　地　中国大陆
◎类　　型　电视剧
◎类　　别　剧情 / 爱情 / 奇幻 / 古装
◎语　　言　汉语普通话
◎上映日期　2023-06-22(中国大陆)
◎IMDb评分　7.8/10 from 116 users
◎IMDb链接　https://www.imdb.com/title/tt28488894/
◎豆瓣评分　8.6/10 from 236,786 users
◎豆瓣链接　https://movie.douban.com/subject/36155049/
◎集　　数　14
◎单集片长　30分钟
◎简　　介
　　来自现代的历史畅销书作家，穿越邂逅遗臭青史的一代 “妖后”，一场双向奔赴的千年爱恋，却发生在一条背道而驰的时间线上，以致于她情深时他不知，他深情时她不识…沈不言以每一次都会穿越到比上一次更早时间的方式展开了一场拯救陆鸢命运的惊心冒险。当他站在了故事的结局，她的故事才刚刚开始，在这注定会擦肩而过的逆向时间河流中，两人该何去何从？

引用 [古相思曲].An.Ancient.Love.Song.EP01.2023.JPN.BluRay.1080p.x264.DTS-CMCT.mkv

📄 原文内容:

引用 ZMPT官组作品，感谢原制作者发布。



◎译　　名　扫恶 / Crush the Wicked / The Sin City
◎年　　代　2026
◎产　　地　中国大陆
◎类　　别　动作 / 犯罪
◎语　　言　汉语普通话
◎上映日期　2026-03-20(中国大陆网络)
◎IMDb链接  https://www.imdb.com/title/tt39389881
◎豆瓣链接    https://movie.douban.com/subject/37332091
◎导　　演　成思毅
◎编　　剧　施一凡
◎主　　演　潘斌龙
　　　　  　包贝尔
　　　　  　赵润南
　　　　  　克拉拉
　　　　  　周大勇
　　　　  　郭子恒
　　　　  　侯浩然
　　　　  　于柏林
　　　　  　释小龙
　　　　  　汤镇业
　　　　  　九孔
　　　　  　常铖
◎简　　介
　　　　7 年前，刑警吴晓光（潘斌龙 饰）与连环劫车杀人犯张斌（包贝尔 饰）擦肩而过，遗憾错过抓捕。张斌携妻子吴倩倩（克拉拉 饰）潜逃后逍遥法外，却因绝症儿子配型被抢再起杀心，目标就是推动这场慈善秀的首富刘晓明。
　　与此同时，当年被哥哥关林（释小龙 饰）拼死从张斌手下护住的关超（赵润南 饰）已长大成人，暗中紧盯吴晓光的每一步追查一心复仇。正邪双方，狭路相逢，一场追凶较量，终需血债血偿……
引用 General

item.description:
🔗 来源: ptchdbits

📅 发布时间: Fri, 03 Apr 2026 11:12:05 +0800

⬇️ 详情: https://ptchdbits.co/details.php?id=537610

📄 原文内容:



◎译　　名　手机换换爱
◎片　　名　Love Today
◎年　　代　2022
◎产　　地　印度
◎类　　别　剧情
◎语　　言　Tamil
◎上映日期　2022-11-04(India)
◎IMDb链接  https://www.imdb.com/title/tt22488728/
◎IMDb评分  8.0/10 from 16118 users
◎豆瓣链接　https://movie.douban.com/subject/36154885/
◎TMDB链接  https://www.themoviedb.org/movie/1032627
◎TMDB评分  7.0/10 from 49 users
◎片　　长　154 minutes

◎简　　介　

　　Uthaman Pradeep is a 24 year old Lead Developer in CTS Chennai. He lives with his mother and sister Divya, who is engaged to a Dentist Yogi for 8 months and is about to get married in 4 days. Pradeep is in a relationship with colleague Nikhita, whose father Venu sastri is a very strict person. Pradeep goes to her house to meet and convince Venu for their marriage in future. Venu, who seems to be an orthodox man, plays around with Pradeep for a while and puts forward a strange deal : Pradeep and Nikita must immediately exchange their mobile devices for one day along with respective mobile's unlocking key. After the end of the period, if they still feel that they are in love, Venu will not object their union. Else, they can go their seperate ways. Both Pradeep and Nikitha agree to it half heartedly and Pradeep comes back home to manage his sister's wedding event. Due to some revelations, Pradeep goes to Venu's home the next day and extends the exchange until end of his sister's wedding, and venu agrees. Pradeep also gets into trouble, as Venu finds a way to bring back all the messages which Pradeep had deleted from his phone, since Pradeep cleaned his chats every week. Meanwhile, Divya and Yogi seem to get along very well, as Yogi is a cultured mild mannered man, who treats Divya as equal. One day, during a botched group call with Divya, Yogi overhears Divya's mom and aunt insulting his physical features when Divya is not around. During the wedding rituals in present, he becomes moody and does not allow anyone to use his phone. This puts a lot of doubt in minds of Divya and her friends. They repeatedly try to get his phone, open it and check the contents, but they are thwarted by Yogi. The rest of the story is about what happens to the two couples, and did they stay united?

引用

General

◎译　　名　Duki：来自世界尽头的说唱天王 / Rockstar: DUKI desde el fin del mundo / Rockstar: DUKI from the End of the World
◎上映日期　2025-10-01
◎产　　地　Argentina

◎简　　介
